name: Taquitos w/ Tomatillo Sauce & Crumbled Queso Fresco Cheese
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique Brand Queso Fresco, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
To make the Tomatillo salsa:
1. Peel the outer thin skins of the tomatillos and dice.
2. Mix with onions, garlic, lime juice, oregano, chilies, cilantro, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Adjust the amount of serrano peppers based on heat preference.
To prepare taquitos:
3. Fill and roll the tortillas with shredded chicken, securing them closed with toothpicks.
4. Heat the oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
5. Deep fry the filled tortillas until crispy, turning occasionally, for about 2-3 minutes per side.
6. Remove the taquitos from the oil and drain on paper towels.
7. Serve topped with the prepared Tomatillo sauce and crumbled Queso Fresco.
